# Layout Patterns

Use these patterns when reviewing or improving Astro UI composition.

## Static Landing Page

- One clear hero.
- One supporting proof section.
- One strong next step.
- Keep the rest of the page secondary.

## Content Page

- Metadata first.
- Prose readable at a comfortable line length.
- Supporting cards should not overpower the content.

## Feature Grid

- Each card has a title, body, and consistent spacing.
- Use visual weight to separate primary and secondary information.
- Avoid making every card feel equally important.

## Small Interactive Island

- Keep the shell static.
- Isolate the interactive part.
- Use the smallest possible client boundary.

## Common Problems

- Centered stacks that remove hierarchy.
- Too many decorative surfaces.
- Motion that competes with the message.
- Mobile layouts that compress into unreadable columns.
